name: VAIL RESORTS INC
business: Vail Resorts operates 42 destination mountain resorts and regional ski areas, along with lodging properties and real estate development. The Company sells lift tickets, pass products, ski school, dining, and retail/rental services to destination and local guests. It also manages luxury hotels under the RockResorts brand and operates National Park Service concessioner properties.

exposures.sentence: Powered by artificial intelligence and resort experts, My Epic Assistant provides real-time service to allow our guests to navigate their day at our resorts with confidence, efficiency and ease.
Cyberattacks or other interruptions to or disruption of our information technology systems and services could disrupt our business.
Vail Resorts launched Commitment to Zero in 2017, our bold goal to reach a zero net operating footprint by 2030.

catalysts.event: Launch of Epic Friend Tickets for season-long pass holders
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in the 2025/2026 North American ski season, we are launching Epic Friend Tickets as a new benefit for our season-long pass holders.

catalysts.event: Launch of Ski and Ride School feature in My Epic App
catalysts.sentence: The Ski and Ride School in the My Epic App is a new technology that creates a seamless, connected and next-level ski and ride school experience. Beginning in the 2025/2026 North American ski season, Ski and Ride School features will be automatically available in the My Epic App for group lesson participants at Vail, Beaver Creek, Breckenridge and Keystone.

catalysts.event: Completion of Park City Sunrise Gondola replacement
catalysts.sentence: Discretionary capital expenditures expected for the remainder of calendar year 2025 include, among other projects: replacing Park City's fixed-grip two-person lift with a new ten-person Sunrise Gondola in partnership with Canyons Village Management Association.

catalysts.event: Amendment of Whistler Credit Agreement to extend maturity and reduce commitment
catalysts.sentence: On September 24, 2025, we amended the Whistler Credit Agreement primarily to extend the maturity date to September 24, 2030, and to reduce the total commitment from C$300.0 million to C$250.0 million.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 780 ski areas in North America, about 490 in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 780 ski areas operating in North America with approximately 490 in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: 81.1 million combined skier visits in North America during the 2024/2025 season
tamClaims.sentence: During the 2024/2025 North American ski season, combined skier visits for all ski areas in North America were approximately 81.1 million.

tamClaims.claim: Vail Resorts North American resorts had 15.4 million skier visits, 18.9% of North American total
tamClaims.sentence: Our North American Resorts had approximately 15.4 million skier visits during the 2024/2025 ski season, representing approximately 18.9% of North American skier visits.

tamClaims.claim: Luxury and upper upscale hotel segments in U.S. have approximately 890,000 rooms at 3,000 properties
tamClaims.sentence: The luxury and upper upscale segments consist of approximately 890,000 rooms at approximately 3,000 properties in the U.S. as of July 31, 2025.
